body:
This pull request updates the edmfx diagnostics file following https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaDiagnostics.jl/pull/64, eliminates the need to return materialized fields. All returned fields are now 

```julia
return @. lazy(some_computation)
```
title: rft: clean up edmfx diagnostics
